name: DAL Nepal N1 5.1x4.35x3 Propeller (Set of 4)

name: T-Motor T6143 Propeller (Set of 4)
description: T-Motor's T6143 racing propeller hits the sweet spot between high and low pitch propellers. Finding the spot between power and efficiency, the T6143 will give you precise control on the racetrack.

name: T-Motor T5143S Propeller (Set of 4)
